description:
At the heart of this collaboration lies a deep exploration: how the violin and
nagaswaram—melodic instruments from divergent lineages—converse, contrast, and
complement one another. Alongside, the rhythmic dialogue between mridangam and
thavil unfolds with equal intrigue and intensity. Crafted with careful
attention to the sonic and musical identities of each instrument, every
performance is a journey—blending composition with improvisation, structure
with spontaneity. It is not merely a fusion, but a celebration of what emerges
when boundaries are set aside and traditions meet in free-flowing expression.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - A Carnatic Quartet - HYD

performer.description: Curated by violinist Shreya Devnath, this Quartet is a unique confluence of four masterful artistes and two powerful instrumental pairings—each rooted in distinct cultural traditions within the Carnatic idiom.
performer.name: A Carnatic Quartet

description:
Their debut album Second Nature explores memory, belonging, and personal
transformation through intimate storytelling. The forthcoming R‑Evolution
expands outward — a groove-driven meditation on climate, power, protest, and
collective reimagining — inviting listeners not just to hear, but to inhabit
the music.
name: Windmills Music Night - Sage For The Ages - BLR

performer.description: Sage for The Ages creates immersive music for the dreamer-listener — soundscapes where jazz improvisation meets neo-soul warmth, psychedelic color, and ambient depth. Led by writer, vocalist, and guitarist Kirtana Krishna, the band balances inward reflection with social awareness, turning lived experience into atmosphere and narrative. Pianist Aman Mahajan shapes the music with surprising harmonic pathways, bassist Dhani Muniz structures each piece with a producer’s ear for tone and space, and drummer Raul Mattia grounds the ensemble in steady, intentional motion.
performer.name: Sage For The Ages

description:
"It is an aural punch in the gut, delivered with a velvet glove. The raw power
of Sarvjeet Tamta's vocals makes one shake one's head in wonder and then shake
it many more times with the sheer joy that infuses the music. It is not easy
to resist the magnetic charm, the sheer power of the music that comes from the
very depths of their hearts and reaches the very depths of the listeners' as
well." - Sarthak Kaushik, 104.6FM.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Rehmat-e-Nusrat Live: Qawwali Unplugged - HYD

performer.description: Formed by lead vocalist & harmonium virtuoso Sarvjeet Tamta, Rehmat-e-Nusrat brings a fresh new perspective to the timeless tradition of qawwali music. These young musicians perform original compositions and qawwalis, Sufiyana kalaams by great poets, and Kabir bhajans.
performer.name: Rehmat-e-Nusrat

description:
Blending Bruce’s genre-fluid guitar and compositional sensibility with
Pallavi’s evocative interpretations, Kayaka weaves Western acoustic folk,
blues, world music, and jazz with Indian folk and classical traditions,
creating a stirring, thought-provoking musical experience.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Kayaka-HYD

performer.description: Kayaka (‘work’) brings together renowned Bangalore musicians MD Pallavi and Bruce Lee Mani to reimagine ancient, progressive Indian poetry within a contemporary musical framework. Drawing primarily from the Vachanas - powerful 11th-century verses written by cobblers, weavers, sex workers, and other working-class voices. The concert foregrounds radical thought that remains strikingly relevant today. A recipient of the prestigious Vachanasri Award, Pallavi has long engaged with this body of work.
performer.name: Kayaka

description:
Together, they craft a powerful musical experience that bridges classical
traditions with contemporary expression. Through original compositions and
innovative arrangements, Lakkshya explores new sonic landscapes while
remaining rooted in Indian classical sensibilities, delivering performances
that are energetic, immersive, and deeply musical.
name: Windmills Music Night - Lakkshya - BLR

performer.description: Lakkshya is a contemporary Indian fusion ensemble that blends the depth of Carnatic music with modern global influences. The band brings together accomplished musicians who create a rich and dynamic sound through expressive melodies, rhythmic complexity, and improvisation. The ensemble features K. J. Diliip on violin, Ila Diliip on violin and vocals, Sunaad Anoor on percussions, Gopi Shravan on drums, Vivek Santosh on keyboard, and Bruthuva Caleb on bass.
performer.name: Lakkshya
